MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephanie Dobozin, via ZOOM, for Paul L. Wattis, Jr., Carol W. Casey and Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., Trustees.

The court begins by asking if counsel knows of any objections to this petition. Counsel replies no and no objections are presented.

The Accounting is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
